name: Aitkin High School Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Aitkin High School Tennis Courts in Aitkin, MN! There are 5 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts can be reserved. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Blue Lake
description: Blue Lake is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Aitkin, MN. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.

name: Covenant Pines Bible Camp
description: Covenant Pines Bible Camp is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in McGregor, MN. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Hockey Rink
description: Hockey Rink is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Aitkin, MN. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Palisade Swanson Park & Community Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Palisade Swanson Park & Community Courts in Palisade, MN! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Rippleside Elementary School
description: Rippleside Elementary School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Aitkin, MN. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.
